phases.name: Requirement Analysis
phases.summary: Phan tich yeu cau Hackathon AI-Native, xac dinh muc tieu tu dong hoa AI Collaboration Log. Dinh nghia scope MVP: CLI + Dashboard + Report.

phases.name: Architecture
phases.summary: Thiet ke Pipeline Architecture voi 8 steps, Provider Agnostic pattern, Event-driven storage voi JSON files. Khong dung Database.

phases.name: Implementation
phases.summary: Implement CLI (Typer), Prompt Compiler, AI Adapters (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini), Metadata Extractor, Event Writer, Cache Builder, Dashboard (React + Vite).

phases.name: Testing
phases.summary: Unit test cho Pipeline steps voi pytest, mock AI providers. Integration test cho CLI commands. Target coverage 90%.

phases.name: Documentation
phases.summary: Viet README, SPEC.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, PIPELINE.md. Tao examples va huong dan su dung.

phases.name: Deployment
phases.summary: Build Dashboard production bundle, chuan bi demo script, verify all commands hoat dong dung.

lessons_learned: Pipeline Architecture giup tach biet responsibilities ro rang, de maintain va test
Provider Agnostic cho phep linh hoat chuyen doi giua cac LLM ma khong anh huong core logic
Event-driven architecture dam bao Single Source of Truth cho toan bo collaboration history
File-based storage (JSON/YAML) don gian, khong can Database, de version control
Incremental cache build giup Dashboard hieu qua khi scale len nhieu events
Read-only Dashboard pattern giam complexity va tranh data inconsistency

key_decisions.title: Chon Pipeline Architecture thay vi Monolithic
key_decisions.reason: Moi step single responsibility, de test, de extend. Co the them step moi (nhu Security Scanner) ma khong sua code existing.

key_decisions.title: Provider Agnostic - khong hard-code LLM nao
key_decisions.reason: Hackathon co the yeu cau doi model bat cu luc nao. Interface-based design cho phep swap provider chi bang config.

key_decisions.title: JSON files thay vi Database
key_decisions.reason: Don gian, portable, co the commit vao repo, khong can setup infrastructure. Dashboard chi doc cache files.

key_decisions.title: Event la Single Source of Truth
key_decisions.reason: Moi data khac (cache, report, dashboard) deu derived tu events. De rebuild bat cu luc nao.

key_decisions.title: Metadata sinh tu dong tu AI response
key_decisions.reason: Developer khong phai copy/paste. AI tu sinh intent, decision, artifacts trong response block =====ADTS=====.
